title: Add keyboard shortcut to switch between workspaces
excerpt: Is there a keyboard shortcut to switch between workspaces? If not this is a feature request. Thanks for some feedback.

posts.author: manuel5 (Manuel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a keyboard shortcut to switch between workspaces? If not this is a feature request. Thanks for some feedback.

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a good idea. Some of us nerds have stream decks and I work in multiple workspaces and how nice would it be to type in a keyboard shortcut or assign a shortcut to switch to a commonly used workspace. I’m using the monday.com windows app .
